rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in a grouped parenthetical citation supporting the general claim that subbranding can buffer parent-brand dilution via subtyping. The citing article does not discuss Janiszewski and Van Osselaer (2000) separately, does not engage its connectionist model, and does not reuse its methods or predictions directly. Given the lack of a distinct, paper-specific role beyond background support in a citation cluster, this is best classified as a mention-only citation.
